title: Outputs stay intentional
summary: Two-dimensional navigation is a browser presentation behavior. Default static outputs stay focused on the core path.

signals.title: Presentation mode
signals.body: Includes the core path plus detours and accepts coordinate hashes like x=2,y=1.

signals.title: Deck preview
signals.body: Uses the core path by default so normal review remains concise.

signals.title: Export
signals.body: PDF and PPTX keep the main path unless a later full-path option is requested.

guardrails.title: Default short path
guardrails.body: Keep default preview and export focused on the core path.

guardrails.title: Explicit full path
guardrails.body: Add full-path export only as an explicit user choice.

guardrails.title: Validate metadata
guardrails.body: Reject missing parents, duplicate detours, and hidden parent slides.
